Motion To Set Aside Judgment Granting Deft'S Demurrer
Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Manuel Sison, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN CHING 510/769-0200, for plaintiff Eric De Mesa, moving to set aside judgment granting defendant's demurrer
Ryan Reimers, Esq. of ERICKSEN, ARBUTHNOT 510/832-7770, for defedant and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF ERIC DE MESA'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment Granting Deft'S Demurrer -- overruled. Defendant Torbon has 10 days to answer. Allstate Insurance Co. is no longer a defendant in this action. Plaintiff is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/KM-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Motion To Set Aside Judgment Granting Deft'S Demurrer
Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Continued To Oct-08-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF ERIC DE MESA'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment Granting Deft'S Demurrer -- Motion to set aside judgment granted pursuant to the mandatory provision of CCP 473(b). Opposition to demurrer to be filed on 9/26, reply to be filed on 10/3. Hearing on demurrer to be held on October 8, 2003. (301/JLW/KM-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
